languages.text: "Вы принадлежите к династии Толиман? Той же, что и Мастер Вигдис?"
"You belong to the Toliman dynasty? The same as my Vox Master, Vigdis?"
languages.original_text: "Вы принадлежите к династии Толиман? Той же, что и Мастер Вигдис?"

traits.locale_text: "You belong to the Toliman dynasty? The same as my Vox Master, Vigdis?"
"You belong to the Toliman dynasty? The same as my Vox Master, Vigdis?"
"You belong to the Toliman dynasty? The same as my Vox Master, Vigdis?"

languages.text: 「あなたはトリマン朝に属しているのですか？私のヴォックスマスター、ヴィグディスと同じか？」
languages.original_text: "You belong to the Toliman dynasty? The same as my Vox Master, Vigdis?"

languages.text: "Toliman hanedanlığına mı mensupsunuz? Voks Üstadım Vigdis ile akraba mısınız?"
languages.original_text: "You belong to the Toliman dynasty? The same as my Vox Master, Vigdis?"

traits.locale_text: "Toliman hanedanlığına mı mensupsunuz? Voks Üstadım Vigdis ile akraba mısınız?"

languages.text: “你们属于托里曼王朝？与我的音阵大师维格迪斯同族？”
languages.original_text: "You belong to the Toliman dynasty? The same as my Vox Master, Vigdis?"

traits.locale_text: “你们属于托里曼王朝？与我的音阵大师维格迪斯同族？”

languages.text: "Ihr entstammt der Toliman-Dynastie? Genau wie Vigdis, meine Voxmeisterin?"
languages.original_text: "You belong to the Toliman dynasty? The same as my Vox Master, Vigdis?"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr entstammt der Toliman-Dynastie? Genau wie Vigdis, meine Voxmeisterin?"

languages.text: « Vous appartenez à la dynastie Toliman, à l’instar de ma maîtresse-vox Vigdis ? »
languages.original_text: "You belong to the Toliman dynasty? The same as my Vox Master, Vigdis?"

traits.locale_text: « Vous appartenez à la dynastie Toliman, à l’instar de ma maîtresse-vox Vigdis ? »

languages.text: «¿Pertenece a la dinastía Toliman? ¿La misma que Vigdis, mi maestra de vocos?».
languages.original_text: "You belong to the Toliman dynasty? The same as my Vox Master, Vigdis?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Pertenece a la dinastía Toliman? ¿La misma que Vigdis, mi maestra de vocos?».
